name: Momentum Breakout
description: High relative volume stocks near 52-week highs with bullish technical breakouts
screening_prompt: Find stocks with high relative volume (>2x average), trading near 52-week highs, with bullish technical breakout patterns. Focus on mid-to-large cap stocks with strong earnings growth. Also include crypto assets showing similar breakout momentum.
trading_style: Day to swing trader, 2-5 day holds

name: Value Accumulation
description: Undervalued names with insider buying and strong fundamentals
screening_prompt: Find undervalued stocks with P/E below sector average, recent insider buying, growing free cash flow, and strong balance sheets. Include crypto projects with strong fundamentals (revenue, TVL growth, token burns).

name: Mean Reversion
description: Oversold stocks near support levels primed for a bounce
screening_prompt: Find stocks with RSI below 30, trading near established support levels, with positive divergences forming. Include oversold crypto assets near key support with high funding rates.
ta_focus: Divergences, oversold bounces, and support tests

name: Earnings Play
description: Stocks reporting earnings within 2 weeks with high implied volatility
screening_prompt: Find stocks reporting earnings within the next 2 weeks that have high implied volatility, strong historical earnings beats, and analyst estimate revisions trending upward.

name: Crypto Momentum
description: High-momentum crypto assets with strong on-chain metrics
screening_prompt: Find cryptocurrencies with strong price momentum, increasing on-chain activity (active addresses, transaction volume, TVL growth), positive funding rates, and strong social sentiment. Focus on top 100 by market cap.
ta_focus: Trend strength and momentum continuation patterns
trading_style: Swing trader, 3-14 day holds in crypto markets
